title: Finite Random Matrix Moment Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite random-matrix bad trace-square moment and expected-rank QF_LRA/Farkas regression seeds
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite matrix-distribution replay computes E[tr(A)^2] = 2 while the malformed row claims 1, and finite rank-mixture replay computes E[rank] = 1 while the malformed row claims 2.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional finite matrix-distribution rows only when they add distinct exact-linear or finite-rank solver pressure; keep asymptotic spectra, concentration, and continuous random-matrix theory in Lean-horizon or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite matrix-valued probability distributions as deterministic QF_LRA table checks.
Replay moment, Gram, determinant, and rank claims through exact rational matrix evaluation.
Route false finite moment and expected-rank constraints through checked QF_LRA/Farkas certificates once exact replay has computed the finite expectation.
Add covariance and concentration-style finite counterexample packs before claiming random-matrix-theory coverage.
Keep asymptotic spectral laws, floating-point simulations, and high-dimensional limit claims under proof/numerical horizon metadata.
